college_info.college_name: North East Frontier Technical University

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the North East Frontier Technical University:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, North East Frontier Technical University offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and Executive MBA/PGDM. The North East Frontier Technical University course fee ranges between INR 7,500 to 3,20,000.

faqs.answer: A:    To be eligible for the BTech at North East Frontier Technical University (NEFTU), candidates must have completed Class 12 with a science stream. Selection is based on marks obtained in national-level entrance exams like JEE or through the university's own entrance examination process.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech in North East Frontier Technical University (NEFTU)?

reviews_list.review_title: Review of North East Frontier Technical University.

review_content.Placements: Almost 55% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 6 LPA. The average salary package offered was 3.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Capgemini, Cognizant, and DXC. About 12% of students got internships from Internshala. Top roles offered were programmer and analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our labs were not well-maintained. Our library and classrooms were spacious. Hostels were average. The sports ground was good. The food served in the canteen was good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: This College is best for my education.

review_content.Placements: 223 people were placed in computer Science in 2021 11-12 LPA is the highest Which they offered for the students who passed with A grade level. Infosys, IBM, teach Mahindra are the companies who acquired a lot of students, my education have got me a valuable desire to my knowledge And I got many friends from different places.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, library are the main places we spend time in our free hours, the whole campus has free Wi-Fi network, hostel facilites are not good though wardens are strict and they usually makes argue with other state students northidian people are very bad in hostels they always ought with us.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Amazing place for students who want to make a successful career..

review_content.Placements: The college has a good and active placement cell. The fees is so low, and provide good quality education. I have joined B.Sc. in 2015. They provide a semester-based study programme. Professional courses are also available. According to me, it's a perfect university if you are interested in the Science field.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available. The campus is fully covered by CCTV. Wi-Fi is available. The library is huge and the atmosphere is friendly. There is a canteen on the campus. The study room is well furnished and clean. The sitting arrangement is amazing. Everyone gets a private area to study without any disturbance.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. content.Infrastructure: Labs, library are the main places we spend time in our free hours, the whole campus has free Wi-Fi network, hostel facilites are not good though wardens are strict and they usually makes argue with other state students northidian people are very bad in hostels they always ought with us.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Amazing place for students who want to make a successful career..

content.Placements: The college has a good and active placement cell. The fees is so low, and provide good quality education. I have joined B.Sc. in 2015. They provide a semester-based study programme. Professional courses are also available. According to me, it's a perfect university if you are interested in the Science field.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available. The campus is fully covered by CCTV. Wi-Fi is available. The library is huge and the atmosphere is friendly. There is a canteen on the campus. The study room is well furnished and clean. The sitting arrangement is amazing. Everyone gets a private area to study without any disturbance.

faqs.question: What documents are required for BCom admission at NEFTU?
faqs.answer: Documents usually include Class 10 and 12 mark sheets, a passport-size photo, valid ID proof, a transfer or migration certificate, and a caste certificate (if applicable). All documents must be uploaded as per the format mentioned on the NEFTU website during the BCom application.

faqs.question: Is BBA admission at NEFTU merit-based or entrance-based?
faqs.answer: BBA admission at North East Frontier Technical University is strictly merit-based. The university does not conduct an entrance exam. Selection is based only on the candidate's performance in Class 12 from a recognised board, preferably in the commerce stream

placement_report.college_name: North East Frontier Technical University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: NEFTU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: North East Frontier Technical University has not released the official placement report for 2023. As per the data gathered from Shikshs students' reviews, almost 55% of students were placed in recent years. Further, the highest package and average package offered during NEFTU placements were INR 6 LPA and INR 3.50 LPA , respectively. Cognizant, Capgemini, DXC Technology, and many other renowned companies offered job opportunities.

tables.context: How is the placement at NEFTU?

faqs.question: How is the placement at NEFTU?
faqs.answer: The placement report or brochure is not out on the official website. As per the details gathered from unofficial sources, 55% of students get placed every year. The highest package and average package offered over the past few years were INR 6 LPA and INR 3.50 LPA, respectively. Check the complete insights of NEFTU placements from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics the highest package INR 6 LPA Average package INR 3.50 LPA the lowest package INR 2.50 LPA Placement rate 55% NOTE: The above statistics are fetched from the Shiksha students' reviews.

faqs.question: What is the highest paying job in Tourism?
faqs.answer: Food and Beverage Director and General Manager of a premier international hotel chain hold highest earning position in Tourism industry. Food & Beverage Director is responsible for managing all parts of organization's food and beverage planning and service like - menu planning costing preparing and presenting food and beverages adhering to quality and safety requirements

faqs.question: What are some of the top recruiters hiring Electrical Engineers?
faqs.answer: Many top international companies having presence in India hire electrical engineers and offer them handsome salary packages . Some of the top recruiters are given here: Larson & Toubro Tata Electric Companies Sterling Schneider Electric Crompton Greaves Siemens Exide Industries Limited Mellcon Engineers

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because of less placement opportunities and bad infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: In our college maximum 15% or 20% students get placed in many local firms, small companies located in city. Salary package offered to them is approximately 1.5LPA to 2LPA which is not satisfied. Top jobs offered in our course are Assistant, accountant, computer operator, etc. Some of them are also selected for campus internship programmes.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college sports facilities are very good, many sports and games materials are provided to us along with proper guidance of coach. There is library with course books and reference books. There is hostel facility, but the mess food is not good, it is indigestible. There is labs for different departments and streams. No Wi-Fi facility, no well maintained classrooms, improper canteen which is always closed.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Tax Procedure - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good sports facility is available but has improper infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Only 10% to 20% students get placed, and the average salary package offered in this course is INR 2 LPA to 2.5 LPA. Top job roles offered in this course are Chartered Accountant, Tax Consultant, Tax Specialist, Cost Estimators, Lecturer, banking sector, etc. Some of the tax firms like EY also recruit students. 10% of the students get internships in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a hostel for girls but the mess food is very bad, quality is poor and unhygienic. Hostel has lights and fans. No Wi-Fi connection is provided to us or to the staff. There is a canteen but is mostly closed. Our classrooms are also not well maintained. There are sports facilities where different types of sports and games equipment are available. There are separate laboratories for different streams. There is no medical facility or first aid support available here.

review_summary.college_name: Government Maharani Laxmibai Girls Post Graduate College, Indore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good college with excellent faculty members and amazing facilities.

content.Placements: In our college, placement is limited because our college doesn't organize any external programs for placement and some companies come for placement. According to passout students, they receive about 2 to 3 lacs per year. Rare company visits our college. About 1/3 of the students got an internship. The top role offered in our college is B.Com., BBA and other commerce stream courses available.
content.Infrastructure: There is a well-stocked library present in our college, where a variety of books, magazines, journals, and newspapers are available. There is a canteen where mornings start with fabulous tea and a good breakfast. There is a hostel with proper furnishings and many top facilities, and the food is very good and acceptable. Sports and games facilities are also available with proper sports and games materials. Classrooms are well furnished with proper lighting and fans.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of bad placements of our college.

content.Placements: Placements opportunities are very bad, 10% to 12% students get placed in small firms and the salary offered to them is very less. Approximately. RS. 10000 to RS. 15000 per month. Which is really less and not good. 15% students get internships by college. Top roles offered in our course is about taxation, finances, business, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Very bad hostel facility is provided to us which is not maintained properly. Mess food is not acceptable at all and it is very bad taste. There are various labs for different departments. There library, all course books are available. There is Canteen with very poor facility always closed. Sports and games facility are good here, well experienced coach are facilitating the students.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with excellent faculty members and amazing facilities.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-stocked library present in our college, where a variety of books, magazines, journals, and newspapers are available. There is a canteen where mornings start with fabulous tea and a good breakfast. There is a hostel with proper furnishings and many top facilities, and the food is very good and acceptable. Sports and games facilities are also available with proper sports and games materials. Classrooms are well furnished with proper lighting and fans.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of bad placements of our college.
reviews.review_text: Very bad hostel facility is provided to us which is not maintained properly. Mess food is not acceptable at all and it is very bad taste. There are various labs for different departments. There library, all course books are available. There is Canteen with very poor facility always closed. Sports and games facility are good here, well experienced coach are facilitating the students.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of less placement opportunities and bad infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our college sports facilities are very good, many sports and games materials are provided to us along with proper guidance of coach. There is library with course books and reference books. There is hostel facility, but the mess food is not good, it is indigestible. There is labs for different departments and streams. No Wi-Fi facility, no well maintained classrooms, improper canteen which is always closed.

reviews.review_heading: Good sports facility is available but has improper infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is a hostel for girls but the mess food is very bad, quality is poor and unhygienic. Hostel has lights and fans. No Wi-Fi connection is  provided to us or to the staff. There is a canteen but is mostly closed. Our classrooms are also not well maintained. There are sports facilities where different types of sports and games equipment are available. There are separate laboratories for different streams. There is no medical facility or first aid support available here.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members, good studies with nice atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Our institute has average infrastructure, there are separate labs for every department, there is a library where our course books and references are available. There is a hostel too providing poor quality mess food that can hardly be eaten. Our classrooms aren't very well maintained as well.

reviews.review_heading: Below average hostel facilities, low placements and less events.
reviews.review_text: While talking about girls hostel, facilities lacking behind. There is poor water facility, low quality mess food, improper maintenance and so on. There is a sports complex where many sports and games are played  by students with good equipment's provided by the college. There is a canteen in campus which is never open. There are labs in every department. There is a library too where not many collections of books are available and to add up no Wi-Fi and medical facilities are provided to students...

reviews.review_heading: Good environment with good campus .
reviews.review_text: Our college has provided us with a library. There are laboratories for various departments and streams. There is a canteen where food is not good at all, and also our canteen is almost always closed. There is sports complex for games and sports, where students take part in different sports activities. There is a girls hostel too, but facilities are not good at all.

reviews.review_heading: It provides the best and experienced teachers.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the classes do not have the proper seating facility of our course, and staff doesn't provide any Wi-Fi facility to students. The library has no such books of use. Hostels are average level, but the food quality is average. There is a canteen but permanently closed. Sports are good in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money college for commerce stream.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure for our course is good and the environment is also good for study but the department facility is not good. There is no Wi-Fi available for students the department didn't provided the password yet. There is one library but no of use because it doesn't have any extra book except course books
 hostel quality is very poor it doesn't have proper drinking facility and mess also not provide the good quality of food many students got diseased due to it. Sports and games are at average...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members but the infrastructure and facilities are of average level.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are good and the infrastructure is at the average level. Each subject or course has its separate department which is helpful to students. A library facility is available but not a vivid range of books are available. Only the course books are easily available, and food at the mess is not good as much but recently improvement had started for food. Sports are very good and helpful to students.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good for the safety of the students but the food served is not good in quality. The infrastructure of our college is average. Canteen is not available in our college. Library is good. RO cold water is provided for students. New building is good, but for BBA and NCC courses, classes are conducted in the old building.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Data Science - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: College placements are not satisfactory.

review_content.Placements: In our senior batch, 70 to 80% of students were placed. The highest package was 12 LPA, and the average package was 6 LPA. More than 20 companies participated in the hiring process, with HCL, Tech Mahindra, Eaton, and Birlasoft among the top companies. Internships are given, but they are project task-based unpaid internships from Oasis Infobyte. Roles we got after the course are Data Analyst and Data Scientist.
review_content.Infrastructure: College campus is big, different colleges in one campus. Our college building was recently built, with Wi-Fi available in the library and hostel. Classrooms are big, and they have projectors. Hostel facilities are good, but it feels more, mess food is good, but I suggest the canteen's food is better. We have a big sports ground in which different sections for cricket, football, basketball are provided separately.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good journey in GY Pathrikar college of CS IT.

review_content.Placements: From the 2023 recession, getting a job in IT became more challenging, but colleges tried their hardest to bring in companies for placements. 50% of the class got jobs, but more students ended up in intern roles. I secured a job at Cravita Technologies as an AWS intern with an average package of 4 LPA. Five students were placed in MNCs, while the rest were placed at startups.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is newly built, and our campus is very big. Each department has its own lab with all computers in working condition. Wi-Fi is not available. The classrooms are good, but projectors are present in specific classrooms only. I do not like the hostel; it has small rooms, and the mess food is bad. Instead, I decided to live in a PG.

review_summary.college_name: Dr GY Pathrikar College of Computer Science and IT Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Integrated (B.Sc. - M.Sc. Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My journey in Dr. G. Y. Pathrikar college.

content.Placements: 70% of students got placed in senior batch as data analyst, data engineers, etc. The highest package is 7 LPA and the average package is 4 to 5 LPA. The minimum package is 3.4 LPA. There are 100% internships with good companies. The top companies that visited the campus were Wipro, TCS, Infosys, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure provided by college is good; it has Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The classroom is also good. Almost every classroom has projectors. The library is not good for focused study because it only has plain tables and chairs, so that is one disadvantage. A drinking water filter is available but not working. A gym is also available for free at the university.

individual_reviews.course: BCA (Hons.) in Digital Marketing - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Having good infrastructure does not guarantee placement.

content.Placements: We are the first batch for a digital marketing course. The college claims a 100% placement guarantee, but I don't believe they provide it. There are very few students who get placements from the college. The highest package a student got from MGM is 8 LPA, with an average of 3 to 4 LPA, and the lowest being 2 LPA. Top recruitment companies include TCS, HDFC, Microsoft, and sometimes Google. Being the first batch, we are unsure about the percentage of students hired from our course, but I believe there is demand for digital marketers, so getting placements from the college should be feasible. Top roles include video editing, social media manager, performance marketer, SEO expert, etc.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Data Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College placements are not satisfactory.

content.Placements: In our senior batch, 70 to 80% of students were placed. The highest package was 12 LPA, and the average package was 6 LPA. More than 20 companies participated in the hiring process, with HCL, Tech Mahindra, Eaton, and Birlasoft among the top companies. Internships are given, but they are project task-based unpaid internships from Oasis Infobyte. Roles we got after the course are Data Analyst and Data Scientist.
content.Infrastructure: College campus is big, different colleges in one campus. Our college building was recently built, with Wi-Fi available in the library and hostel. Classrooms are big, and they have projectors. Hostel facilities are good, but it feels more, mess food is good, but I suggest the canteen's food is better. We have a big sports ground in which different sections for cricket, football, basketball are provided separately.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good journey in GY Pathrikar college of CS IT.

content.Placements: From the 2023 recession, getting a job in IT became more challenging, but colleges tried their hardest to bring in companies for placements. 50% of the class got jobs, but more students ended up in intern roles. I secured a job at Cravita Technologies as an AWS intern with an average package of 4 LPA. Five students were placed in MNCs, while the rest were placed at startups.
content.Infrastructure: The college is newly built, and our campus is very big. Each department has its own lab with all computers in working condition. Wi-Fi is not available. The classrooms are good, but projectors are present in specific classrooms only. I do not like the hostel; it has small rooms, and the mess food is bad. Instead, I decided to live in a PG.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Best IT College in Marathwada region.

content.Placements: Mass recruiters like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, and Cognizant hire us at 3–4 LPA. The lowest salary is offered by SAS Technology at 15,000 per month. In the class, 50% of students get jobs. No internships are given by the college; we have to hunt for them ourselves. In the 2023 batch, placements are the worst in the last five years.
content.Infrastructure: The college is newly built and well-maintained. Free Wi-Fi is available everywhere, but it has some search restrictions. There are more than 60 computers in the computer lab. Hostels are available on campus with 24*7 security and CCTV. The mess food is moderate in taste and quality. In sports events, cricket, football, kabaddi, volleyball, and basketball matches take place.

reviews.review_heading: My journey in Dr. G. Y. Pathrikar college.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure provided by college is good; it has Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The classroom is also good. Almost every classroom has projectors. The library is not good for focused study because it only has plain tables and chairs, so that is one disadvantage.
A drinking water filter is available but not working. A gym is also available for free at the university.

reviews.review_heading: Having good infrastructure does not guarantee placement.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good; we have a lift in our building, spacious libraries for studying, and Wi-Fi for students. Classrooms and labs are dedicated, with separate computer labs. I have no information about the hostel, but I have tried the food from the mess and canteen once, and although I didn't like it much, it's better than other mess food, I guess.

reviews.review_heading: College placements are not satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: College campus is big, different colleges in one campus. Our college building was recently built, with Wi-Fi available in the library and hostel. Classrooms are big, and they have projectors. Hostel facilities are good, but it feels more, mess food is good, but I suggest the canteen's food is better. We have a big sports ground in which different sections for cricket, football, basketball are provided separately.

reviews.review_heading: Good journey in GY Pathrikar college of CS IT.
reviews.review_text: The college is newly built, and our campus is very big. Each department has its own lab with all computers in working condition. Wi-Fi is not available. The classrooms are good, but projectors are present in specific classrooms only. I do not like the hostel; it has small rooms, and the mess food is bad. Instead, I decided to live in a PG.

reviews.review_heading: Best IT College in Marathwada region.
reviews.review_text: The college is newly built and well-maintained. Free Wi-Fi is available everywhere, but it has some search restrictions. There are more than 60 computers in the computer lab. Hostels are available on campus with 24*7 security and CCTV. The mess food is moderate in taste and quality. In sports events, cricket, football, kabaddi, volleyball, and basketball matches take place.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college because of its placements in 2018.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, etc. The food served in the mess, hostel, and canteen is good. 0ur college provides us with sports, games, and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied and enjoyable every moment.
reviews.review_text:
* The facility and the infrastructure of the course and department is excellent. * The quality of the facility in hostel, food good. * mess and canteen are excellent 
* medical facilities re available for the students as well as for hostelers
* Strict rules and regulation.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are labs, libraries, and classrooms to study for different departments. There is Wi-Fi for students to study online. There are all facilities in hostel, good quality of food in canteen, have sports curriculum for students to participate in different activities.

reviews.review_heading: You can experience college life as per your desire .
reviews.review_text:
Our college building and campus area is one of the biggest  in our city and the college has their own University.
The hostels of our college are safe and clean and the food of our mess and canteen was good and hygienic. 
Medical faculty of our college is also good 
Sports and games activities are well organized in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is good and teaching is also good but not that much of value for money.
reviews.review_text:
The wi-fi is only for staff and not for student and labs are fine but not computer they have. They have some older computer. Classrooms and library are very net and clean. I am not in hostel but there is canteen in college serves decent food and not that much of interest in sports
.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and their teaching skills.
reviews.review_text:
Our institution has a pleasant environment. For practicals, there is a magnificent computer lab available. There are large classrooms and a library available.
There are many books available for study in the library. Hostel quality is good for outstation students. The food in the canteen is of high quality. Sports ground is available.

reviews.review_heading: You can experience the best college life here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, computer labs, and system setups are available here. Classrooms are clean and huge. The library has a lot of books to choose from. The hostels of the college are really clean and have facilities like a water cooler, a water heater, clean beds, fans, toilets, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend this college for students who want good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has a big 4-storyed building where it has all the classrooms and labs. Laboratories are provided with high-tech computers and technology, which helps in academic performance. The library is good and has various books which you can borrow on a card.

reviews.review_heading: The placement rate is increasing year by year.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is huge, and all facilities are provided in our college. Our college has a very clean and neat area. Our college properly uses all the resources and has an eco-friendly environment which can attract every student. For students, various sports activities are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for getting a degree and also for some enjoyment, but placements are not offered.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were good, but the fees and other costs were higher than expected. You could get admission only if you wanted a degree, nothing more than that. Sports and games were available, and some tournaments were held. You could play volleyball and cricket every day.

overview_faqs.question: Can RCP Universe Group of Institutions be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: RCP Universe Group of Institutions is a renowned institution offering B.Ed, M.Sc, UG Diploma, After 10th Diploma, B.Sc, B.J.M.C, B.Com. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Teaching & Education, Science, Engineering, Animation, Design, Mass Communication & Media, Accounting & Commerce. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. RCP Universe Group of Institutions boasts an impressive review rating of 3.3 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.5 for Campus Life, 3.5 for Placements, 4 for Faculty, and 3.5 for Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the RCP Universe Group of Institutions?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the RCP Universe Group of Institutions is around INR 105000.

review_summary.college_name: RCP Universe Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of the student in our course got placement. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. The average salary offered was Rs. 30,000 per month. Top recruiting companies like Google, Microsoft, Apple, IBM, HCL, etc., visit our campus for placements. A top role like finance is offered to the students. Almost 100% of students got an internship according to their interest in companies like Atrenta, Flipkart, ICICI Bank, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Classrooms and computer labs Wi-Fi enabled. There are about 1,000 books in the library by which a person can learn many things. The college does not provide hostel facility, and one can stay outside in PGs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It has a good location. The fee is high. Faculty members support their students.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide placement. Only one faculty member is available for all semesters. Our college status is so high. There are twenty courses for students. Practicals are available only for pharmacy students and not for other course students. Placements are available only in some small local medical companies for pharmacy students. There are no placements for other course students.
content.Infrastructure: One library is available. We have found our 50% books but not 100%. There is a church in the college. There are no study materials. Other course students do not have any facilities and faculty members. There are no labs for practicals. There is no fixed time to open and close the college.

admission_overview.college_name: RCP Universe Group of Institutions Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: RCP Universe Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: RCP Universe Group of Institutions admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.RCP Universe Group of Institutionsoffers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels. Some of the courses include B.J.M.C., B.Ed, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 90,000 - 3,28,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

college_info.intro:
NIELIT Imphal popular programmes are BCA, certificate, and diploma courses. BCA and various other popular programme students are placed in top companies such as INTEL, Wipro Technologies, and others. BCA students can become Managers, Team Leaders, or can even go for other non-technical job profiles. These students can even go for further studies. The total seat intake for the BCA course is 200. admission_overview.college_name: NIELIT Imphal Admission 2025: Application, Eligibility, Important Dates & Updates

paragraphs: NIELIT Imphal admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. NIELIT conducts an entrance exam to shortlist candidates for long-term courses. For all other programmes, the selection is based on merit or admission test.NIELIT Imphaloffers degree and diploma courses in affiliation withManipur University. Besides, the institute also offers more than 40 short-term and long-term programmes. Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

The institute offers nearly 30 short-term certificate courses. The duration of these courses varies fromfour to twelve weeks. Besides, the institute also offers a certificate in digital literacy programmes. Below areNIELIT coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Download:NIELIT Imphal Prospectus

NIELIT Imphal fee is a sum of multiple components such as registration, tuition, examination fees, etc. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. Below is course-wise fee and seat intake forNIELIT Imphal courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

NIELIT Imphal admissionfor long-term courses is usually held in January and July. Besides, admission for short-term courses are open throughout the year. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in NIELIT Imphal:
STEP 1: NIELIT Imphal Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Candidates can also collect the form from the reception centre of the campus. Candidates need to fill out personal, academic and other details in the application form. Aspirants also need to pay an application fee of INR 300 to register for BCA, DCSE and DECE courses.
STEP 2: Selection

NIELIT selects candidates for admission to non-formal courses based on NIELIT Entrance Exam. The institute evaluates the application form of the aspirants for admission. For formal courses, the selection is based on an admission test conducted by the institute. Admission to short-term courses is based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the aspirants are informed about their selection, they need to pay theNIELIT Imphal feeto confirm their seat.

faqs.answer: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Imphal offers admission to most of the formal courses based on admission test conducted by the institute. The selection for short-term courses is based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants applying for non-formal long-term courses need to qualify NIELIT Entrance Exam for admission.

faqs.question: Are admissions at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Imphal entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Imphal admission considers NIELIT Entrance Exam score for admission to non-formal courses. NIELIT Exam is conducted on all Indian levels twice in a year. The institute also accepts CUET-PG score for admission to MCA. For most of the formal courses, the selection is based on an admission test conducted by the institute. Besides, the selection is merit-based for short-term programmes.

faqs.question: Can I apply for NIELIT Imphal with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete Class 12 to apply for BCA, O Level, and other courses. National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Imphal has a specified a minimum aggregate for 50% for most of the courses. Hence, aspirants with 60% in Class 12 can apply for the course of their choice. The mode of application is online. However, candidates can also collect the form from the centre.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at NIELIT Imphal?
faqs.answer: NIELIT Imphal admissionis open throughout the year for enrolment of short-term courses. The selection for long term courses is based on NIELIT Entrance Exam. The NIELIT 2024 theory exam for O/A/B/C levels is scheduled to be conducted onAug 3,  2024, toAug 7,  2024. The results for the July cycle is expected to be out in October.

reviews.review_text: The classrooms are huge and spacious. The laboratories are up-to-date with modern teach, fast and powerful computers. The quality of food served in the mess and the living condition in the hostel are great.

reviews.review_heading:
The Institute that gives you a boost in the IT Industry
.
reviews.review_text: The computer laboratory has high-end computers capable of programming, designing and developing website, etc. The classrooms have a huge space for the students. The library also has a large collection of journals, books and other resources on Computer Applications, Programming, etc. The hostels have all the necessary facilities.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college for enthusiastic students.
reviews.review_text: The institution has well modernized infrastructure with up-to-date computer systems. Classrooms are well-equipped with proper lighting, boards, well ventilated (many with ACs). But the Wi-Fi is not open to all. It's hot well managed modern library. Standard hostel & canteens are available.

reviews.review_heading: The place is very good like heaven. Atmosphere is very clean.

Library was very big if you wanted to find anything in the library. Hostel fee was very low. All students were staying very healthy and very clean.

reviews_list.batch_info: Arena Animation International Program (AAIP-VFX) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Arena Animation, Preet Vihar is perfect in every way.

review_content.Placements: Arena Animation deals with some of the best companies in the market. Every week, we hear that our seniors are getting placed in some reputed companies with good salary packages. A year ago, my brother got a job, and now, he is getting the salary package of Rs. 50,000 per month. People can also work as the freelancer during the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in the college is not that good that it has to be, but still good in many ways. I like the way that they show the student's work. I also like a little inspiring graffiti which is in the college. Everything is good and impressively maintained. Every class has a unique centre of attraction.

reviews_list.batch_info: Graphics, Web Design and Development (GWDD) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Arena Animation, Preet Vihar.

review_content.Placements: It has been only 3 months for me, and it is decent as of now, as we have 1–2 hours of class per day for 5 days a week with additional assignments for practice which is essential. Various types of workshops are held here, which are surely beneficial to students. Almost I have completed 1 year in this course, and it was useful learning with various tools to know about. This institute will teach you only the basics, and the rest all depends on the individual on how they approach and develops their skill accordingly. I had a good experience learning about new tools and gathering knowledge in this field. I had a bad experience of getting a job. The institute is even willing to send you as a recommendation to various companies after they receive the full amount of the course. They sent our show-reels to quite a few companies just how a normal person looking for a job would send. Ultimately we had 1–2 job interviews with not much promising response. I got a job at a start-up company. The only good thing was that their stipend was high as compared to the other companies. More than 90% of students get placement in popular companies like Green Gold Animation, Maya Digital Studios, EBS, TCS, etc. Based on your skill and your work, they give you deployment in the companies as I have seen to my seniors. It has been 21 years as Arena Animation Multimedia is available with a good reputation.

admission_process.title: Arena Animation Preet Vihar Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Arena Animation, Preet Vihar admission 2025 inquiry portal is open.The institute accepts candidates based on their performance in the last qualifying exam. Students can pursue certificate courses in the fields ofAnimation,VFX,Gaming,Web Design,and more.Arena Animation, Preet Vihar admission is merit-based. The programmes are certified and recognised by Media & Entertainment Skills Council (MESC). On completion ofArena Animation Preet Viharcourses, candidates are awarded a certificate of successful course completion.

ForArena Animation Preet Vihar course admission, candidates must meet the eligibility requirements of the courses as per the institution's admission guidelines. Eligible candidates can fill out the application form for admission. As admissions are on a first-come first-served basis, no other selection round is required for admissions. Students can refer to the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria forArena Animation Preet Vihar course:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Arena Animation Preet Vihar has a pretty simple admission process, which doesn't involve any complex selection process. The institute provides Certificate programmes under various specialisations. All candidates must do is fulfill the eligibility criteria and directly apply for their desired course. Find the admission procedure below:
Step 1: Arena Animation Preet Vihar Application Process

Candidates must visit the official website ofArena Animation Preet Vihar( https://www.arena-multimedia.com/in/en/ ) and fill out the inquiry form for information. The application form will be available on the website. Interested students must fill out the application form with all details and submit it with the required fee.
Step 2: Arena Animation Preet Vihar Selection Process
After filling out the application form, aspirants need to wait for the admission letter. The institute selects candidates based on their performance in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

After filling out the form, candidates can be asked to submit the required documents and pay the admission fee for admission confirmation. The institute then shall inform the student regarding the class schedule and other important details.

reviews_list.review_title: The best days of the life to cherish.

individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, good faculty members, and good facilities.

content.Placements: I was offered a salary package of Rs. 15,000 per month. Skills matter for placements, not the percentage. The top roles offered are 3D modelling and texturing.
